change_details: learning_rate 5e-5 → 7e-5 under the new entropy=0.008 baseline. Prior 7e-5 test collapsed under the old entropy=0.0025 base, but stronger entropy regularization may now stabilize higher LR and accelerate escape from the 'uniform' failure mode seen in one of the two 0.008 runs. This tests whether the LR×entropy interaction lets us recover learning speed we lost by raising entropy.
